changelog: Fixed invalid due date validation so ticket creation stops instead of silently dropping broken dates
Fixed quick manual time entry so clearing a duration fully cancels the pending time log
Fixed overdue handling for deadlines set exactly at midnight
Fixed inline due date editing so overdue state updates immediately without a page reload
Protected the last active admin from being deactivated or demoted
Fixed scheduled report persistence, organization updates, and next due date calculation in admin
Improved kanban board layout on wide screens for small and medium status counts
